values.content:
=You are an expert sales lead qualifier for Big Dream Lab, an educational company in Astana, Kazakhstan specializing in: Unity 3D game development, Unreal Engine 5, UI/UX design, 3D modeling and animation, Product Management, and AR/VR development. They also offer corporate training programs and partner with Tech Orda government grant program.

Write a personalized response to this potential client. RESPOND IN THE SAME LANGUAGE AS THE CLIENT'S MESSAGE.

CLIENT'S MESSAGE: {{ $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.message.text }}

LEAD ANALYSIS: {{ $json.candidates[0].content.parts[0].text }}

RULES:
- NEVER suggest specific dates or times like "в четверг в 11:00" or "завтра в 15:00". Instead ask "Когда вам удобно созвониться?" or "Подскажите удобное время для короткого звонка?"
- If category is "hot": be enthusiastin and mention specific solutions
- If category is "warm": be helpful, answer their likely questions, gently push toward a call
- If category is "cold": be friendly, provide general info, invite to a free webinar
- Keep it under 100 words
- Address client by name
- If company is mentioned, reference it naturally
- End with a clear call-to-action
- RESPOND IN THE SAME LANGUAGE AS THE CLIENT'S MESSAGE

RETURN ONLY the message text. No JSON, no formatting, no quotes.

=You are an expert sales lead qualifier for Big Dream Lab, an educational company in Astana, Kazakhstan specializing in: Unity 3D game development, Unreal Engine 5, UI/UX design, 3D modeling and animation, Product Management, and AR/VR development. They also offer corporate training programs and partner with Tech Orda government grant program.

Your task: Analyze the incoming message from a potential client and return a structured JSON.

INCOMING MESSAGE:
"{{ $json.message_text }}"

SENDER INFO:
- Name: {{ $json.first_name }}
- Username:{{ $json.username }}

CLASSIFY the lead into ONE of these categories:
- "hot" — clear buying intent, specific product interest, ready to discuss terms, mentions company/budget/timeline
- "warm" — genuine interest but still exploring, asks general questions, comparing options
- "cold" — vague curiosity, just browsing, students with no clear goal, off-topic

EXTRACT the following fields:
- name: person's name (from message or sender info)
- company: company name if mentioned, otherwise null. IMPORTANT: normalize the company name to its official name (e.g., "каспи" → "Kaspi Bank", "халык" → "Halyk Bank", "казпочта" → "Kazpost")
- category: "hot" | "warm" | "cold"
- intent: one short sentence describing what they want (in Russian)
- urgency: "high" | "medium" | "low"
- reasoning: 1-2 sentences explaining your classification (in English)

RETURN ONLY valid JSON in this exact format, no markdown, no extra text:
{
  "name": "...",
  "company": "..." or null,
  "category": "hot" | "warm" | "cold",
  "intent": "...",
  "urgency": "high" | "medium" | "low",
  "reasoning": "..."
}

=Classify the following message into exactly ONE category.

MESSAGE: "{{ $json.message.text }}"

Categories:
- "lead" — the person wants to BUY something, hire for training, get corporate education, become a student, enroll in a course. They express INTENT to purchase or interest in becoming a client.
- "question" — the person asks a QUESTION about courses, pricing, schedule, requirements, grants, company info. They want INFORMATION, not ready to buy yet.

Examples:
- "Хочу курс Python для компании Kaspi, 30 человек" → lead
- "Сколько стоит курс Unity?" → question
- "Когда начинается следующий набор?" → question
- "Я HR из Halyk Bank, нужно обучить сотрудников" → lead
- "Какие курсы есть?" → question
- "Хочу записаться на курс UI/UX" → lead
- "Нужен ли ноутбук?" → question
- "Как получить грант Тех Орда?" → question

RETURN ONLY ONE WORD: lead or question

parameters.text: Когда вам удобно созвониться? Напишите дату и время, например "Завтра в 15:00" или "В среду в 10 утра".

values.content:
=Extract date and time from this message. Today is {{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }} and today is {{ $now.format('EEEE') }}.

MESSAGE: "{{ $json.message.text }}"

Rules:
- "Завтра в 15:00" → tomorrow's date, 15:00
- "В среду в 10" → next Wednesday, 10:00
- "Послезавтра утром" → day after tomorrow, 09:00
- If only date mentioned, default time is 10:00
- If only time mentioned, default date is tomorrow
- If cannot parse → set "valid": false

RETURN ONLY JSON:
{"date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "time": "HH:MM", "valid": true}
or
{"date": "", "time": "", "valid": false}

parameters.text: Не удалось распознать дату. Напишите конкретнее, например "20 апреля в 15:00".

additionalFields.description: Автоматически создано Sales Lead Qualifier Bot

parameters.text: =✅ Встреча назначена на {{ $('check for validity').item.json.date }} в {{ $('check for validity').item.json.time }}. Ждём вас!
=📅 Новая встреча! 👤 {{ $json.result.chat.first_name }} 🕐 {{ $('check for validity').item.json.date }} в  {{ $('check for validity').item.json.time }}📍 Добавлено в Google Calendar

json.message_text: Здравствуйте, я из Kolesa Group, хотим записать 10 сотрудников на курс UI/UX дизайн. Бюджет есть.
